title: linochilus oblongifolius
intro: Linochilus oblongifolius, a tropical plant species also known as the 'Elephant Ear' or 'Taro', is a type of rhizomatous perennial with edible leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, attributed to its various compounds and alkaloids. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, such as aiding in digestion, reducing fever, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the leaves and tubers of Linochilus oblongifolius are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices.
